results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'The last scroll costs you sleep' is relatable but not specific or contrarian enough — it's a familiar warning without a concrete payoff or number to stop the thumb.
rationales.clarity: Each slide stays on one idea and the action (quiet half hour, dim lights, swap the phone) is concrete and doable this week.
rationales.audience_fit: Speaks directly to the tired-by-3pm crowd who already suspect their phone habit is wrecking their sleep, without being preachy or overwhelming.
rationales.novelty: Screen-time-before-bed advice is among the most saturated topics in wellness — no fresh angle, stat, or counterintuitive twist to differentiate it.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are properly hedged ('may support', 'can help'), tone is plain and calm, and the CTA ties back to the score mechanic without hype.
rationales.predicted_performance: Low novelty and a soft hook predict below-average saves/shares — this won't earn the 'I never knew that' save or the 'send this to a friend' share.
